name: cryptoguard
description: Per-transaction deterministic crypto validator. Validate trades (PROCEED/CAUTION/BLOCK), scan tokens, detect rug pulls — powered by WaveGuard physics engine. 5 free calls/day.

tools.name: cryptoguard_validate_trade
tools.description: Validate a crypto trade BEFORE execution. Returns PROCEED/CAUTION/BLOCK verdict with risk score, flags, and recommendation.

tools.name: cryptoguard_scan_token
tools.description: Scan a token for anomalous market behavior via WaveGuard physics engine. Compares to tier-matched peers.

tools.name: cryptoguard_validate_trade_plus
tools.description: Premium stateless decision bundle for one-shot trade gating. Provides verdict, risk score, instability/mechanism signals.

tools.name: cryptoguard_counterfactual_trade
tools.description: Stateless what-if sensitivity analysis. Submit baseline + counterfactual variants for tipping-point guidance.

tools.name: cryptoguard_rug_check
tools.description: Assess rug pull risk for a DEX trading pair. Scores 6 risk factors (0-100).

tools.name: cryptoguard_search
tools.description: Search for tokens by name, symbol, or contract address to find CoinGecko coin IDs.

tools.name: cryptoguard_health
tools.description: Check CryptoGuard API health, version, and service status.
